strategies.name: Test
strategies.expected_issue: The compiler will incorrectly assume the result has 1 leading one (i.e., is negative), but the actual sum is -128, which in 8 bits is 10000000. Wait, 10000000 has 1 leading one! So it is correct.

test_traj:
{"found": false, "tool": "verify", "args": "-passes=instcombine", "original_ir": "define i1 @reduce_add_simplify_comparison(ptr %p) {

  %and = and <8 x i32> %vec, splat (i32 16777215)
  %sum = call i32 @llvm.vector.reduce.add.v8i32(<8 x i32> %and)
  %cmp = icmp ult i32 %sum, 134217728
  ret i1 %cmp
}
